message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="Working on Step 3 Contexts, stand by">
We're working on Step 3: Contexts — domain type, DB migration, CRUD, default context seeding, and a context management UI page. Luca Palmieri is the Driver. I'll broadcast review requests once Luca has code ready for review. Stand by.
</teammate-message>

content.text:
Understood. Standing by for Luca's code to review. Contexts is a great next step -- I'll be watching for:

- Proper semantic HTML on the context management page (form elements, lists, labels)
- CSS following our cascade layers and design token system
- Mobile-first responsive layout
- HTMX progressive enhancement (works without JS first)
- Consistent component styling patterns with existing pages (inbox, etc.)

Ready when the review request comes in.
